principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix construction solidity with high-end gallery aesthetics.
Emotion First: Trust, reliability, and craftsmanship.
Content is King: Let the 76 real project photos do the talking.
Zoom In: Use detail shots of textures (wood, tile, paint) as backgrounds.
Negative Space: generous padding (p-12, p-24) to frame the work.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tight tracking (-0.02em). Uppercase for labels.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs and UI text. Good legibility at small sizes.

usage_rules: Do NOT use Gold (#D4AF37) for large backgrounds. Use it for buttons, icons, and active states only.
Use Charcoal (#1A1A1A) for the Footer and Trust Signals section background.
Keep the main content area White (#FFFFFF) to let the photos pop.

elements: CTAs: Primary (Gold) 'Request a Free Estimate', Secondary (Outline) 'View Our Work'
Background: High-quality completed kitchen or bathroom shot (use one of the best FB_IMG files).

trust_signals.design: Charcoal background, Gold icons, White text.

gallery.interactivity: Filter by category (Kitchen, Bath, Flooring, etc.)
gallery.feature: Before/After Slider component for top transformations.

contact.style: Split Layout (Form Left / Info + Map Right)

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white hover:bg-[#B5952F] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm

cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group

before_after_slider.description: Draggable slider to reveal the 'After' image over the 'Before' image.

images.instructions: Scan the directory. Use a random selection for the initial render, but verify dimensions if possible. Prioritize landscape images for Hero.

rules: Ensure Gold text on White background has sufficient contrast (it often fails). Use Gold for graphical elements, use Dark Gold or Charcoal for text.
Alt text for all project images describing the work done.
Keyboard navigation for the Lightbox and Before/After slider.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Theme Setup: Configure Tailwind colors in `tailwind.config.js`.
2. Font Setup: Add Google Fonts imports to `index.css`.

3. Image Logic: Create a utility to map `FB_IMG_...` filenames to specific categories (Kitchen, Bath, etc.) if possible, or use a randomized display if metadata is missing. Since filenames are generic, you might need to manually tag a few for the Hero/Services, or build a simple 'admin' helper to view them.
5. Form: Hook up the Contact form to Formspree.
6. Bilingual: Implement a simple Context for Language (EN/ES) toggling all text.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT center align long paragraphs.
